quick_skim.title: On the Increased and Decreased Connectivity of the Demented Human Brain
quick_skim.abstract: With the enormous advances in cerebral imaging techniques, a large amount of data is available for studying the aging and demented brain. In this contribution, we apply the OASIS-3 dataset for identifying small areas of the human gray matter, which have higher- or lower structural connectivity in dementia and aging. As anticipated, we found that finer structures of the hippocampus and the temporal lobe show decreased connectivity in dementia. More surprisingly, the precuneus, the cuneus, and finer structures in the insula show higher connectivity in dementia than in the healthy state.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: investigates structural brain connectivity changes in dementia using OASIS-3 dataset, relevant to brain connectome analysis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用OASIS-3数据集研究痴呆症中脑结构连接变化，与脑连接组分析相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用OASIS-3数据集研究痴呆症中脑结构连接变化，与脑连接组分析相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用OASIS-3数据集研究痴呆症中脑结构连接变化，与脑连接组分析相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper studies structural connectivity changes in dementia and aging using the OASIS-3 dataset. It identifies areas of increased and decreased gray matter connectivity, revealing both expected hippocampal decreases and surprising increases in precuneus and insula. The work directly contributes to brain connectome understanding in neurological disorders.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文利用OASIS-3数据集研究痴呆和衰老过程中脑灰质结构连接的变化。发现海马体和颞叶精细结构的连接性在痴呆中下降，而楔前叶、楔叶和脑岛精细结构的连接性反而增强。这些发现揭示了痴呆症脑连接组异常的复杂模式，为理解疾病机制提供了新线索。研究直接涉及脑连接组分析，与神经退行性疾病的诊断和病理研究密切相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文利用OASIS-3数据集研究痴呆和衰老过程中脑灰质结构连接的变化。发现海马体和颞叶精细结构的连接性在痴呆中下降，而楔前叶、楔叶和脑岛精细结构的连接性反而增强。这些发现揭示了痴呆症脑连接组异常的复杂模式，为理解疾病机制提供了新线索。研究直接涉及脑连接组分析，与神经退行性疾病的诊断和病理研究密切相关。
